verdicts.D8-C1: KILL — dispersion 0.52bps/8h << flip cost 4.0bps; does NOT add over funding LEVEL (net -44 Sharpe). surrogate p=1.
verdicts.D4-M1: KILL — strongest result but timed beta: BTC beta 0.65, residual alpha Sharpe ~0, consume-once holdout 0.03 vs 1.60 in-sample. All edge in the BTC-regime gate.
verdicts.D4-S2: KILL — net Sharpe ~0, selection surrogate p=0.50 (random pairing reproduces it). Canonical GGR confirmation.
verdicts.D4-S7: KILL — negative even gross (-0.83), net -1.11, surrogate p=0.98. Textbook exists-gross-dies-net, here not even gross.
verdicts.D3-A3: KILL (alpha) / WS (vol model) — GARCH-timed net Sharpe 0.451, EGARCH 0.467, but LOSES to B&H @ matched avg exposure (0.488) and to constant vol-target (0.467). realLift = -0.037 (NEGATIVE). GARCH-simulated zero-edge surrogate: p(lift>=surrogate)=0.575, surrogate P95 lift +0.127 > real lift. DSR p=0.079 @ N=108, PBO=0.67, block-boot CI on mean includes 0. Vol model is real (EGARCH-forecast vs Deribit DVOL corr 0.54, 1113d) but timing the long leg = smoother beta, not alpha. Sibling of excluded A8 confirmed.
verdicts.D4-M4: KILL — Frog-in-the-pan / information discreteness. ID=sign(PRET)*(%neg-%pos) over formation daily moves (low ID=continuous mover). Best config F84_W0.3_S0.5, 312 weekly rebalances, 10bps rt. ID-label placebo IS broken (p=0.01) and the VOL double-sort does NOT reproduce the lift (volSpread Sharpe -0.02 vs fipSpread 0.81), so the prior 'ID is just inverse-vol' mechanism is wrong — but the conclusion holds via a cleaner path: the low-ID-minus-high-ID SPREAD adds ZERO incremental return over plain momentum (paired block-boot mean diff +0.00004/wk, 95% CI [-0.0146,+0.0150] straddles 0; incremental-over-momentum t=1.51 n.s.; fipSpread 0.81 < momentum 0.84). The long-only lowID 'edge' (0.96 vs 0.84) is amplified TIMED BTC BETA (beta=1.26, MORE than plain momentum) that REVERSES in the consume-once holdout: lowID holdout -0.82, does not beat momentum OOS (-0.70). DSR p=0.68 (fipSpread) / 0.83 (lowID) @ honest N=64, PBO=0.21. Survives the ID-placebo but dies on incremental-over-momentum + consume-once holdout + DSR.

a3_binding_gate: GARCH-simulated zero-edge surrogate + matched-exposure B&H control (real lift negative, surrogate lift positive)
m4_binding_gate: incremental-over-momentum block-boot CI (straddles 0) + consume-once holdout (lowID -0.82) + DSR@honestN
